title: niphopsis angustatus
intro: Niphopsis angustatus, also known as Chinese silver grass or Yin chen, is a type of plant used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. Health benefits associated with Niphopsis angustatus include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Niphopsis angustatus typically involve steaming or boiling the leaves to make a tea or decoction, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
